Clinical Evidence: Moderate

Lumosity

One of the most well-known brain training platforms with over 100 million users.

About This Tool

Lumosity offers over 60 cognitive games designed by neuroscientists with personalized daily workouts.

How It Helps

  • Memory — spatial recall, working memory, and associative memory
  • Attention — focused and divided attention tasks
  • Processing speed — rapid visual identification exercises
  • Cognitive flexibility — task-switching challenges
  • Problem-solving — logic and planning games
  • Daily consistency — structured 15-minute workouts

Best For

Memory & Brain Fog

Multiple memory games with progressive difficulty

ADHD & Focus

Attention games build sustained focus

Depression & Mood

Daily achievements provide positive reinforcement

Anxiety & Panic

Predictable daily structure reduces anxiety

Visit Lumosity →

Alternative Tools

Other tools you might find useful for similar goals.

BrainHQ

Clinically proven processing speed training.

Elevate

Communication and writing skills training.

Peak

40+ games with Brain Performance Index.
